description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.8-alpine Docker image and defines a single stage called release. Add a publish job that runs only for tag pipelines, is manual, and executes the following shell commands in order: apk add --no-cache build-base libffi-dev libressl-dev musl-dev libffi-dev; pip install poetry; poetry config pypi-token.pypi ${POETRY_PYPI_TOKEN_PYPI}; poetry publish --build. The job publishes the built package to PyPI using the provided token.
